title: Before He Cheats
why_this_song: Before He Cheats by Carrie Underwood (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Right now, he's probably slow dancin'"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Right now, he's probably slow dancin'"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Right now, he's probably slow dancin'"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I dug my key into the side of his pretty little souped-up four-wheel drive"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Maybe next time he'll think before he cheats"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Carved my name into his leather seats
I took a Louisville slugger to both headlights
I slashed a hole in all four tires
Maybe next time he'll think before he cheats
Right now, he's probably slow dancin'
With a bleached-blond tramp and she's probably gettin' frisky
Right now, he's probably buyin' her some fruity little drink

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "probably" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "probably" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "right" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Right now, he's probably slow dancin'
Maybe next time he'll think before he cheats

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Before He Cheats" was released in 2005. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Before He Cheats" foi lançada em 2005. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
